passage.title: Garden Watch Board
passage.text: Our group keeps a tree season board near the window. After recess, Hana checks it before cleanup time. The tree season board has small notes for flowers, bugs, and rain for the day's job. Ms. Choi asks us to watch the plants and talk about change. Sometimes we compare today's note with yesterday's note and notice one small change. We like the tree season board because it helps us care for the plants better.

questions.prompt: What is this passage mostly about?
questions.rationale: The whole passage explains how the tree season board is used.

questions.prompt: Where is the tree season board?
questions.rationale: The first sentence says the tree season board is near the window.

questions.prompt: When does Hana use the tree season board?
questions.rationale: The second sentence says Hana uses it after recess.

questions.prompt: What does the tree season board have?
questions.rationale: The third sentence says the tree season board has nature notes.

questions.prompt: What does compare mean in the fifth sentence?
questions.rationale: Compare means to look at two things and think about them together.

questions.prompt: What does notice mean in the fifth sentence?
questions.rationale: Notice means to see and pay attention to something.
